/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libair_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/air_lab_interfaces/libair_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/air_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/air_lab_interfaces/srv/_execute_tst_s.c.o CMakeFiles/air_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/air_lab_interfaces/msg/_goal_s.c.o CMakeFiles/air_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/air_lab_interfaces/msg/_goals_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/leime957/TDDE05/ros2_ws/build/air_lab_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libair_lab_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libair_lab_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
